public_metrics.notable_visible_detail: One visible review described comparing five offers.

observations.what_customers_say: A visible customer review described comparing several offers before choosing a provider.
observations.decision_relevance: Customers may already be evaluating a shortlist and need decision clarity.

observations.what_customers_say: Personal referral appeared as an important trust input in the visible review.
observations.decision_relevance: A buyer may trust comparable local proof more than generic brand claims.

observations.what_customers_say: The customer valued having coordination handled across the process.
observations.decision_relevance: Convenience can be a real value driver if the responsibilities are specific.

observations.what_customers_say: Customers value help with registration and administrative tasks.
observations.decision_relevance: Paperwork relief can reduce perceived friction in signing.

observations.what_customers_say: The review context centers on residential PV for own electricity use.
observations.decision_relevance: Savings and autonomy framing should be tied to actual household consumption patterns.

cross_source_notes: Referral and comparison signals also appear in Otovo and broader consumer guidance.
Administrative handling connects to full-service package expectations in GSMSolar and Alteon patterns.
caveats: This is a visible page slice, not a representative sample.
Local proof must come from permissioned installer assets.
